title: Wheelchairs and foam matts for 2 disabled children in remote Malawi Village
summary: Two young children in Salima are in dire need of wheelchairs. Your support will be highly appreciated.
body: Two young children - one with Cerebral Palsy (age 14)and one with Spina Bifida (age 5)- are in dire need of wheelchairs/mobility devices. In addition, because they are unable to be mobile, there are skin issues like pressure sores. We're working to raise 1,800 dollars to provide mattresses and chairs for them. 📩 Ways to Give: • Venmo: @Kristell-Willmer • Zelle: kristellwillmer@gmail.com • Tax-deductible: please email me.
